Heart Health Analysis
Parameter Observed Values Standard Range Heart rate within normal range.
Stress Coping Ability Analysis
PR Interval 128 ms 100 ms - 200 ms
Low: There's risk of developing stress-induced disease, weakened ANS function.
QRS Interval 88 ms 60 ms - 120 ms
HRV Test Analysis
QT Interval 349 ms 300 ms - 450 ms HRV parameters in abnormal range.
Balanced SNS activity
Balanced autonomic activity: Sympathetic and parasympathetic (vagal) tone in
QTc Interval 285 ms 300 ms - 450 ms
equilibrium.
LF 1266 ms² within standard range (754–1586).HF 361 ms² OUTSIDE standard range
(772–1178)!
Heart Rate 80 bpm 60 bpm - 100 bpm
Heart Electrical Stability Test Analysis
No significant ANS impairment detected; autonomic flexibility is within normal limits.
This is a computer-generated ECG interpretation. Clinical validation by a licensed healthcare
professional is required.
